query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CAST(valor_informado AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_informado, SUM(CAST(valor_liberado AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_liberado, SUM(CAST(valor_glosado AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_glosado FROM recebimento_tiss
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CAST(valor_informado AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_informado, SUM(CAST(valor_liberado AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_liberado, SUM(CAST(valor_glosado AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_glosado FROM recebimento_tiss
